Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import json
from pathlib import Path

# Find East Egg and West Egg entity IDs
with open\('data/grounded_entities.jsonl'\) as f:
    entities = [json.loads\(l\) for l in f]
fict = {e['canonical_name']: e['entity_id'] for e in entities if e['type'] == 'fictional'}
print\('Fictional entity IDs:', fict\)

# Find constraints involving them
with open\('data/constraints.json'\) as f:
    model = json.load\(f\)
latent_ids = {e['entity_id'] for e in model['latent_entities']}
for c in model['constraints']:
    if any\(eid in latent_ids for eid in c['entities']\):
        if len\(c['entities']\) >= 2:
            names = [next\(\(e['name'] for e in model['latent_entities'] + model['fixed_entities'] if e['entity_id'] == eid\), eid\) for eid in c['entities']]
            print\(f\\"  {c['type']:20s} {names[0]:35s} ↔ {names[1]:35s}  w={c['weight']:.2f}\\"\)
" 2>&1 | head -50)

Bash(PDF="/Users/David/Downloads/WheelOfFortuneLab-DavidDriscoll/FitzTry1/corpus/raw/service-gdc-gdclccn-02-02-99-50-02029950-02029950.pdf"
.venv/bin/python -c "
import fitz
doc = fitz.open\('$PDF'\)
print\(f'Pages: {len\(doc\)}'\)
# Check if first few pages have text
for i in range\(min\(3, len\(doc\)\)\):
    text = doc[i].get_text\(\)
    print\(f'Page {i+1}: {len\(text\)} chars, preview: {repr\(text[:100]\)}'\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import json
# Print summaries for key Amazon/Madeira entities
with open\('data/convergence/posterior_summaries.jsonl'\) as f:
    for line in f:
        e = json.loads\(line\)
        if any\(k in e['name'].lower\(\) for k in ['amazon', 'madeira', 'rio', 'brazil', 'theresop']\):
            print\(f\\"{e['name']}: mean=\({e['posterior_mean']['x']:.1f}, {e['posterior_mean']['y']:.1f}\) std=\({e['posterior_std']['x']:.1f}, {e['posterior_std']['y']:.1f}\) entropy={e['spatial_entropy']:.2f}\\"\)
")
